_comment: WebGL GPU pool — coherent (vendor, renderer, version, extensions) tuples seen on real Chrome installs. Each entry MUST come from a real machine you or a contributor own. Do not scrape browserleaks/webglreport without permission. Selected deterministically by clark::seed::Pick keyed on the fingerprint seed, filtered to entries whose `platforms` matches --fingerprint-platform.

entries.renderer: ANGLE (Intel, Intel(R) Iris(R) Xe Graphics (0x00009A49) Direct3D11 vs_5_0 ps_5_0, D3D11)
entries.shading_language_version: WebGL GLSL ES 1.0 (OpenGL ES GLSL ES 1.0 Chromium)
entries._TODO: populate `extensions` from a real machine capture; until then, use ANGLE's standard ES2 set
